mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weather_vilage_cache ( nx, ny, lat, lng, base_date, base_time, pty, sky, tmp, weather_cd, weather_text, fetched_at, fail_cnt, last_fail_at, last_err_msg ) VALUES ( #{nx}, #{ny}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{baseDate}, #{baseTime}, #{pty}, #{sky}, #{tmp}, #{weatherCd}, #{weatherText}, NOW(3), 0, NULL, NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lat = VALUES(lat), lng = VALUES(lng), base_date = VALUES(base_date), base_time = VALUES(base_time), pty = VALUES(pty), sky = VALUES(sky), tmp = VALUES(tmp), weather_cd = VALUES(weather_cd), weather_text = VALUES(weather_text), fetched_at = NOW(3), fail_cnt = 0, last_fail_at = NULL, last_err_msg = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT pty, sky, weather_cd, fetched_at, tmp FROM weather_vilage_cache WHERE nx = #{nx} AND ny = #{ny}

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 WHEN MAX(last_request_at) IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN MAX(last_request_at) <= DATE_SUB(NOW(3), INTERVAL #{cooldownMinutes} MINUTE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ok FROM weather_vilage_cache WHERE nx = #{nx} AND ny = #{ny}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO weather_vilage_cache ( nx, ny, base_date, base_time, pty, sky, weather_cd, fetched_at, fail_cnt, last_request_at ) VALUES ( #{nx}, #{ny}, '', '', NULL, NULL, 'W999', NOW(3), 0, NOW(3) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_request_at = NOW(3)
